name: Chris Mearns
shortBio:
Chris Mearns is a metabolic health researcher and founder focused on a missing layer beneath modern metabolic models.

Rather than debating calories, insulin, or hormones in isolation, he studies a shared early energy state that appears across chronic diseases, a defensive, low-energy posture that forms easily under modern conditions and becomes progressively harder to exit. His work helps explain why existing models are directionally correct, why popular therapies often help but plateau, and why relapse is so common once interventions stop.
